nasb.text: Then he turned away from him to another and said the same thing; and the people answered the same thing as before.

esv.text: And he turned away from him toward another, and spoke in the same way, and the people answered him again as before.

cnv.text: 大衛離開他的哥哥，轉向另一個人，問同樣的問題。眾民還是用先前的話回答他。

ccb.text: 他又去问其他人同样的问题，得到了同样的答复。
